name: OpenX
description: Programmatic ad exchange and SSP serving mobile, web, and CTV with high-scale real-time bidding infrastructure.

seo.title: OpenX — Ad Monetization / Mediation
seo.meta_description: OpenX: Programmatic ad exchange and SSP serving mobile, web, and CTV with high-scale real-time bidding infrastructure.

when_to_use: Real-time bidding inventory monetization for mobile publishers
Header bidding integration for CTV and web display inventory
Premium programmatic demand for high-scale mobile app publishers

pros: Strong mobile, CTV and web coverage
cons: Commodity SSP economics with thin margins
Header bidding complexity for small pubs
review.verdict: Dependable commodity SSP to include in header bidding, but not a mobile-first specialist.
review.best_for: Large publishers wanting another demand source in their header bidding wrapper.
review.not_for: Mobile-only app publishers needing SDK-first tooling and app-specific demand.
